title: eremospatha dransfieldii
intro: Eremospatha dransfieldii, also known as the Dransfield's climbing palm, is a species of flowering plant in the family Arecaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of this plant include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Eremospatha dransfieldii can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's extracts in topical creams and ointments.
